AIModelSection.description: A section of AI models with an optional header and a list of model items.

header.description: Optional section header text (e.g. 'Advanced Models - DuckDuckGo subscription')

items.description: List of AI models in this section

ReasoningEffortOption.description: A reasoning-effort option for a reasoning-capable model, including its localized display copy and availability.

id.description: Stable server key for this reasoning-effort option; round-tripped on submit.

name.description: Localized display name for this reasoning-effort option.

description.description: Optional localized subtitle shown beneath the name.

status.description: Whether this option is selectable ('available') or gated behind a subscription upsell ('unavailable').

AIModelItem.description: An individual AI model available for selection.

shortName.description: Short display name for the model selector button

description.description: Optional short description shown beneath the model name in the selector.

isEnabled.description: Whether the model is enabled and selectable

isBeta.description: Whether this model is in beta; drives a 'Beta' badge in the model selector.

accessTier.description: Access tiers that grant this model (e.g. 'internal', 'free', 'plus', 'pro'). Drives the tier badge (Plus/Pro/Internal) in the model selector.

supportsImageUpload.description: Whether this model supports image attachments

supportedFileTypes.description: MIME types this model accepts as file attachments; empty or omitted means it accepts no files. Drives the file picker's `accept` attribute and clears attached files the newly-selected model doesn't support.

reasoningEfforts.description: Reasoning-effort options this model supports, each with localized copy and availability. Empty or omitted means the reasoning picker is hidden for this model.

showCustomizePopover.title: Show Customize Popover
showCustomizePopover.description: Controls a popover that onboards users and points them towards how to disable the feature via the customizer

enableAiChatTools.title: Enable AI Chat Tools
enableAiChatTools.description: Feature flag to enable AI chat tools (model selector, image attachments)

selectedModelId.title: Selected Model ID
selectedModelId.description: The user's currently selected AI model, persisted across tabs

aiModelSections.title: AI Model Sections
aiModelSections.description: Sections of AI models for the model selector.

showViewAllAiChats.title: Show View All AI Chats
showViewAllAiChats.description: When enabled, shows a 'View all chats' link at the bottom of the recent AI chats list

enableImageGeneration.title: Enable Image Generation
enableImageGeneration.description: Show 'Create Image' toggle in the AI chat toolbar.

enableWebSearch.title: Enable Web Search
enableWebSearch.description: Allow AI chat submissions to include web search tool.

enableVoiceChatAccess.title: Enable Voice Chat Access
enableVoiceChatAccess.description: Show a 1-click voice-chat button in place of the AI chat submit button when the input is empty.

enableAskAiSuggestion.title: Enable Ask Duck.ai Suggestion
enableAskAiSuggestion.description: Controls whether the inline 'Ask Duck.ai: <query>' suggestion is rendered in the omnibar dropdown. Missing/undefined is treated as true for backward compatibility. Does not affect the Duck.ai mode pill or any other AI affordance — those remain governed by enableAi.

enableAttachTabs.title: Enable Attach Tabs
enableAttachTabs.description: Show the paperclip entry point and accept `@` mentions for attaching open tabs as context to a Duck.ai submission. When true, the omnibar can call `omnibar_getOpenTabs` and `omnibar_getTabContent`.
